description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring alternating black and light gray stripes running parallel across its length. The sides of the block are solid black, giving it a bold, modern appearance. The striped pattern on the top is sharply defined, suggesting a deliberate design, possibly for visual signaling or aesthetic contrast. The block appears dense and heavy, with a smooth but slightly textured stone surface. There are no visible engravings, markings, or signs of significant weathering. Its robust construction and striking pattern make it suitable for use as an urban obstacle or barrier.
description: A rectangular stone block with a flat, striped black and gray top and solid black sides, designed for urban use. The surface is smooth and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped top surface and solid black front face.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the lengthwise orientation of the stripes and the solid black side.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the striped top and black rear face visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the lengthwise stripes and solid black side.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a visual and physical barrier
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surface appears clean and well-maintained.
